name: analytics
summary: PostHog product analytics with a typed event layer — no ATT prompt, no-op without a key in dev.

env.name: EXPO_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY
env.note: Project API key (publishable, not a secret). Absent in dev = analytics no-ops.

env.name: EXPO_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_HOST
env.note: e.g. https://eu.i.posthog.com. Defaults to US cloud.

postInstall: npx expo install posthog-react-native expo-file-system expo-application expo-device expo-localization
PostHog is ATT-free: do NOT enable IDFA/advertising id. No App Tracking Transparency prompt needed.
Add EXPO_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY only when you want events; without it the layer no-ops cleanly.
Never log PII/secrets as event properties — the typed events keep the surface controlled.
